stemHtml:
Which of the following statements are correct about different failures of ADIRU parts?

1. When ADC is accidentally turned off during flight, that’s not a problem as it is possible turn it back on
2. When ADC is accidentally turned off during flight, it is a major problem as it cannot be turned on
3. When IRS is accidentally turned off during flight, it is a major problem as it cannot be realigned during flight
4. When IRS is accidentally turned off during flight, it is not a problem as it can be realigned
